content:text:2:42.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:3:11.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:3:11.html: The Salvation Army provides shelter to anyone in need when it is 35 degrees and below.
content:textarea:3:11.content: The Salvation Army provides shelter to anyone in need when it is 35 degrees and below.
content:textarea:3:11.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:5:4.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:5:4.html: The Salvation Army Center of Hope at 2019 22nd Street.
content:textarea:5:4.content: The Salvation Army Center of Hope at 2019 22nd Street.
content:textarea:5:4.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:6:65.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:65.html: Doors open at 6:00 p.m. for Cold Weather Shelter clients and close at 10:00 p.m. for lights out. Dinner is at 6:30 p.m. and light breakfast will be provided at the shelter.
content:textarea:6:65.content: Doors open at 6:00 p.m. for Cold Weather Shelter clients and close at 10:00 p.m. for lights out. Dinner is at 6:30 p.m. and light breakfast will be provided at the shelter.
content:textarea:6:65.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:7:30.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:7:30.html: Participation is primarily focused to individuals from the lower six counties; we are unable to accommodate unplanned participants from outside this area.
content:textarea:7:30.content: Participation is primarily focused to individuals from the lower six counties; we are unable to accommodate unplanned participants from outside this area.

content:text:10:94.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:11:24.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:11:24.html: We use the Gulfport International Airport weather to decide if the shelter will be open according to these weather reports so we can coordinate supplies and volunteers.
content:textarea:11:24.content: We use the Gulfport International Airport weather to decide if the shelter will be open according to these weather reports so we can coordinate supplies and volunteers.
content:textarea:11:24.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:12:54.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:12:54.html: Small meals will be provided for dinner and breakfast. Guests must complete a health survey and present a photo ID prior to entry. Space is limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis.
content:textarea:12:54.content: Small meals will be provided for dinner and breakfast. Guests must complete a health survey and present a photo ID prior to entry. Space is limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis.
content:textarea:12:54.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:30:3-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:15:64.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:15:64.html: The Salvation Army MS Gulf Coast is happy to assist you on cold and extreme weather nights.  However, for your safety, the safety of your neighbor, and the comfort of everyone staying we ask that you govern yourself by these guidelines.  Violation of these guidelines can result in denial of services.
content:textarea:15:64.content: The Salvation Army MS Gulf Coast is happy to assist you on cold and extreme weather nights.  However, for your safety, the safety of your neighbor, and the comfort of everyone staying we ask that you govern yourself by these guidelines.  Violation of these guidelines can result in denial of services.

content:wysiwyg_basic:16:49.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:16:49.html:
• No Weapons
  • No Alcohol
  • No Drugs
  • No Profanity or Slurs
  • No Bullying
  • No Food or Drink Allowed in the sleeping area
  • No Sexual Acting out
  • Be respectful of yourself and others
  • Leave bad or quarrelsome attitudes off tsa property
  • Everyone entering consents to a Breathalyzer test and searches of their bags and person
  • Smoking is only allowed Outside – Use Ash Cans
  • During these times: 6 to 10 pm and 6 to 7 am
  • Smoking is not allowed during lights out.
  • Stay outside the door – Loitering around the building is not acceptable

content:wysiwyg_basic:19:59.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:19:59.html:
• Do not loiter in the front lobby. This area is closed during Cold Weather Shelter hours
  • Pets – we all love our pets, but we cannot bring them to the shelter
  • Enter or Exit only through the entrance
  • During these times: 6 to 10 pm and 6 to 7 am
  • Stay out of areas marked “Employee Only”
  • Tv will be at the discretion of the Volunteer in Charge and only family-appropriate entertainment allowed
  • Dinner is at 6:30 pm – Eat what you want while it is being served.
  • When everyone is served, the food will be put away and the kitchen cleaned. Food will not be available after that
  • Water is the only beverage served after 8:30 pm
  • No Coffee will be brewed after 8:15 pm
  • Lights out from 10:00 pm to 6:00 am. This means you are to be lying down on your cot, cell phones on silent and everyone is quiet.

content:wysiwyg_basic:27:48.html: Sign up to volunteer at our cold weather shelter by emailing Wanda.Lowe@uss.salvationarmy.org.
